title: SensorStatus
description: Sensor registration/health/coverage. Published periodically to cuas.sensor.status.{sensorId} and returned by the C2 registry.

vendor.description: Informational; the sensor is interchangeable behind the government interface.

mode.description: Current operating mode (e.g., SEARCH, TRACK, DWELL).

taskable.description: Whether the sensor accepts remote tasking (Imperative 4).

coverage.description: Coverage volume the sensor can observe.

softwareVersion.description: Adapter/firmware version; reported for OTA fleet posture.
